summary: Post-refactoring testing of Graupner Suite. Backend split from 2600-line server.py into 15+ route modules. Frontend split from 6300-line App.js into 17+ page components. Fixed 1 bug (Invoice model order_id type). All 26 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend navigation and features verified working.

fixed.issue: GET /api/invoices returning 500 - ResponseValidationError: 'order_id' expected string but got None
fixed.root_cause: Invoice model had order_id: str = '' but database had order_id: None for some invoices
fixed.fix: Changed Invoice model order_id to Optional[str] = '' in /app/backend/models.py

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns statistics with customers_count, quotes, orders, invoices, anfragen, monthly
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview?view=anfragen returns grouped data by categories
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview?view=kunden returns grouped data by customer statuses
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview?view=leistungen returns grouped data by services/articles
Backend: GET /api/customers returns list
Backend: POST /api/customers creates customer, GET verifies persistence
Backend: POST /api/customers/{id}/to-anfrage converts customer back to inquiry
Backend: GET /api/anfragen returns list
Backend: GET /api/anfragen?category=Schiebetür filters by category
Backend: GET /api/quotes returns list
Backend: GET /api/quotes/followup - specific route NOT shadowed by /{id}
Backend: POST /api/quotes/check-followup returns followup_count
Backend: GET /api/orders returns list
Backend: GET /api/invoices returns list (after fix)
Backend: GET /api/invoices/overdue - specific route NOT shadowed by /{id}
Backend: GET /api/invoices/due-soon returns list
Backend: GET /api/articles returns list
Backend: Article CRUD (create, update, delete) works
Backend: GET /api/services returns list
Backend: Service CRUD (create, update, delete) works
Backend: GET /api/settings returns company settings
Backend: PUT /api/settings updates and persists
Backend: GET /api/email/log returns list
Backend: GET /api/ returns version 2.0.0
Frontend: Login page loads with form
Frontend: Login with admin/admin123 navigates to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (Kunden, Angebote, Rechnungen)
Frontend: Dashboard shows overdue warning banner
Frontend: Dashboard shows Wiedervorlage button
Frontend: Dashboard shows revenue chart (Umsatz)
Frontend: Dashboard shows invoice status chart (Rechnungsstatus)
Frontend: All navigation links present (Dashboard, Kunden, Anfragen, Angebote, Aufträge, Rechnungen, Artikel, Leistungen, E-Mail-Protokoll, Einstellungen)
Frontend: Customers page loads with customer list and status filter pills
Frontend: Anfragen page loads with category filters (Schiebetür, Fenster, Innentür, Eingangstür, Sonstige Reparaturen)
Frontend: Quotes page loads with 'Neues Angebot' button
Frontend: Orders page loads
Frontend: Invoices page loads with Mahnwesen tab and overdue detection
Frontend: Articles page loads
Frontend: Services page loads
Frontend: Email Log page loads
Frontend: Settings page loads with Fahrtkosten and Zahlungsziele sections
Frontend: Webhook page accessible
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful - all 15+ backend route modules working correctly
Route ordering preserved - /quotes/followup and /invoices/overdue not shadowed by /{id} routes
Frontend 17+ page components all rendering correctly
Token-based auth (query parameter) working across all endpoints
All CRUD operations verified for customers, articles, services
Dashboard stats, charts, and warnings all functional
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 11 customers, 6 quotes, 3 orders, 5 invoices, 3 anfragen
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring completed and verified. Backend server.py (65 lines) now imports 15+ route modules from /app/backend/routes/. Frontend App.js (77 lines) now imports 17+ page components from /app/frontend/src/pages/. All functionality preserved. Fixed Invoice model order_id type issue. Route ordering correct - specific routes before parameterized routes. Token auth uses query parameter (?token=xxx), not Authorization header.

bug_fix_details.root_cause: Pydantic ResponseValidationError - Invoice model expected order_id as string but database had null values
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Changed order_id: str = '' to order_id: Optional[str] = '' in /app/backend/models.py line 158
bug_fix_details.verification: All 26 backend tests now pass including GET /api/invoices
